name: Tonic Production Readiness - Find and Fix Issues

description: Baseline: 20 readiness gaps (18 oversized files, 2 partial parity items)
Split typing.rs (782→294 lines): extract infer_expression_type + call helpers to typing_infer.rs (495 lines)
Split resolver.rs (1086→401 lines): extract ModuleGraph to resolver_graph.rs (488), tests to resolver_tests.rs (210)
Split llvm_backend/tests.rs (739→395 lines): extract codegen tests to tests_codegen.rs (349 lines)
Split parser/tests.rs (1213→490 lines): extract to tests_forms.rs (335) and tests_modules.rs (393)
Split manifest.rs (1239→414 lines): extract stdlib constants (239), parsing (310), tests (291)
Split stubs_for.rs (778→406 lines): extract static for eval engine to stubs_for_ops.rs (379 lines)
Split interop.rs (1580→199 lines): extract 1410 lines of inline tests to 4 test files
Split stubs_try.rs (562→293 lines): extract emit_try_ops to stubs_try_ops.rs (276 lines)
Split runtime_patterns.rs (574→345 lines): extract emit_pattern_case to runtime_patterns_emit.rs (238 lines)
Split interop/http_server.rs (1407→484 lines): extract tests to 2 files, status_reason to utility file
Split interop/system.rs (1445→481 lines): extract net helpers (480) and IO host functions (500)
Split parser/ast.rs (1112→473 lines): convert to directory module, extract Expr enum (347) and impl Expr (302)
Split runtime.rs (1673→289 lines): extract eval (423), try helper (126), for comprehension (408), tests (450)
Split llvm_backend/codegen.rs (1716→349 lines): extract analysis, instructions, builtins, terminators, patterns
Split ir.rs (2243→413 lines): extract collect, lower, lower_expr, arms helpers, patterns, tests (7 files)
Split main.rs into cmd_*.rs handlers + split lexer.rs (2083 lines) into directory module with 5 files
Split lexer/tests.rs (730→464+273 lines) into tests.rs and tests_extended.rs
Split stubs.rs (3484 lines) into 5 helper files + thin orchestrator — helper files exceeded 500 lines, net metric worsened from 3 to 5
Split stubs.rs (3484 lines) into 10 content files + thin orchestrator — all under 500 lines, zero oversized files remaining
Added universal diagnostic hints — converted 19 bare usage() calls to usage_with_hint() with contextual suggestions, closing 1 partial parity gap
Added proper Binary value type for bitstring literals — RuntimeValue::Binary in interpreter, TN_OBJ_BINARY in C backend, updated guards/pattern matching/IO rendering/GC
Created json_encoder example app + examples/README.md catalog. All 4 apps in examples/apps/ run successfully.
Added word_counter example app — file I/O, string splitting, map accumulation, for comprehensions, recursive list processing. 5 apps now run successfully.
Added file_tree example app with System.list_dir + System.is_dir stdlib additions — recursive directory walking with tree-style formatting. 6 apps now run successfully.
Added csv_processor and config_parser example apps — structured text parsing, String.split, Map building, for comprehensions. 8 apps now run successfully.
Added markdown_headings and mini_template example apps — string processing, template substitution, tuple construction, recursion over key lists. 10 apps now run successfully.

Added text_stats and path_analyzer example apps. text_stats: text file analysis with character/word/line counting. path_analyzer: filesystem path analysis and normalization. 12 apps now run successfully.
Added todo_manager and env_report example apps — task management with file persistence, environment inspection and reporting. 14 apps now run successfully.
Added grep_lite and ini_parser example apps — text search and INI config parsing. 16 apps now run successfully.
Added log_analyzer and diff_viewer example apps — log file analysis and text diff comparison. 18 apps now run successfully.
Added roman_numerals and morse_code example apps — encoding/decoding, pattern matching, map lookups. 20 apps now run successfully.
Added caesar_cipher and number_base example apps — Caesar cipher encryption/decryption, integer base conversion. 22 apps now run successfully.
Added checksum_validator and sorting_demo example apps — checksum computation/validation, sorting algorithm demonstrations. 24 apps now run successfully.

Added output correctness validation for all 24 examples — 18 deterministic with expected_output.txt, 6 non-deterministic with expected_patterns.txt. Metric now measures correctness, not just runnability.
Added unit_converter and url_parser example apps — unit conversions and URL parsing. 26 apps now produce verified-correct output.
Added matrix_math and hex_dump example apps — nested list arithmetic and byte-level hex formatting. 28 apps now produce verified-correct output.
